title: 异步通信与数据并行：惰性 PP 同步、DP wave 共识、负载均衡

run_env.where: host (pure-Python companion; no import vllm / no CUDA / no ZMQ)
run_env.docker: not needed — companion uses _bridge.py host stand-ins (Handle / FakeDPGroup / FakeSocket); no real NCCL/ZMQ/msgspec touched

files.test_dp_wave.py: sync_dp_state OR/pause-consensus, 32-step throttle, wave bump, START_DP_WAVE
files.test_dp_coordinator.py: wave state machine, stale-wave exclude=None, stats counts

linters.lint_fidelity: PASS (no BLOCKING) — # SOURCE coverage, no fabrication, must_keep symbols present

behavioral_grounding.note: Tester verified the companion reproduces REAL vLLM behavior at pin f3fef123 (not just self-consistency) by diffing the control flow against source.
verified_verbatim: ParallelConfig.sync_dp_state == vllm/config/parallel.py:L666-691 (2-elem SUM all-reduce; SUM>0=OR, SUM==dp_size=pause consensus; pause_count%dp_size!=0 keeps has_unfinished_global True — verbatim)
DPEngineCoreProc._has_global_unfinished_reqs == vllm/v1/engine/core.py:L1846-1862 (step_counter%32 throttle, pause_consensus -> ignore_start_dp_wave, clear pending_pause — verbatim)
run_busy_loop wave-bump == vllm/v1/engine/core.py:L1818-1842 (global idle -> rank0/has_coordinator client_index=-1 emits wave_complete, current_wave++, step_counter=0 — verbatim)
DPCoordinatorProc wave_complete/start_wave handling == vllm/v1/engine/coordinator.py:L410-447 (current_wave<=wave -> wave+1+pause; start_wave race handling; broadcast (None,wave,running) — verbatim)

DPLBAsyncMPClient.get_core_engine_for_request score == vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py:L1360-1373 (score=waiting*4+running, min_score, eng_start_index rotation, += client_count pre-increment — verbatim)

subtraction_check: All subtractions are dossier subtraction_plan.delete-approved (elastic-EP/SCALE_ELASTIC_EP, stats out-of-order detection, SP all_gather, cpu_custom_send_recv fast-path, numel()==0, late-interaction hash routing). All must_keep symbols present and exercised by tests.
